Joaquin to Carthage Ln 13 VS-01 Isolation -- COMPLETE


Notice Text:

Texas Eastern has completed the previously posted Joaquin to Carthage Line 13 VS 1 isolation (March 25 - March 27) ahead of schedule and the line has been returned to normal operations.

Effective immediately, all restrictions associated with this outage have been lifted.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.



BackPrint
